githubDetails.title: Bug report - 4 gang wall switch stopped working
githubDetails.response:
### Issue #1356: 4 Gang Wall Switch Stopped Working

Thank you for your detailed report regarding the Moes 4 gang wall switch (model TS004F) not functioning after the upgrade to version 0.2.75. Let's analyze the provided Zigbee interview data to understand the situation better.

#### Device Overview
